name: Smartlook Session Recording & Analytics API
what_it_does: Session recording and product analytics platform with REST API for accessing session recordings, heatmaps, funnels, and event analytics for both web and mobile apps — helping teams understand user behavior through visual recordings and quantitative analysis.
use_cases: Querying session recordings and user events via API for automated behavior analysis
Retrieving funnel conversion data programmatically for reporting agents
Accessing heatmap aggregated click data for UX optimization workflows
Filtering sessions by user attributes or events for targeted review
Integrating Smartlook data with CRM or analytics platforms via REST API
not_for: Real-time error alerting and monitoring (use Sentry or Highlight.io)
Backend application performance monitoring (Smartlook is frontend-focused)
Quantitative analytics at the depth of Mixpanel or Amplitude
best_when: A product team needs combined session replay, heatmaps, and funnel analytics with strong mobile SDK support and API access for data integration.
avoid_when: You need backend monitoring, real-time error tracking, or deep event analytics beyond session replay.

auth.notes: API key from Smartlook dashboard. Bearer token authentication. Project-scoped access. Separate SDK key for data collection vs. REST API key for data retrieval.

pricing.notes: Strong free tier for small products. Pricing scales with session volume. Mobile analytics included in plans. Acquired by Cisco in 2023 — enterprise backing. Competitive with Hotjar and FullStory.

performance.rate_limits: REST API rate limits apply; SDK ingestion is async

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for querying sessions, events, and funnels. Webhook support for real-time event delivery. SDK integration well-documented for all major platforms. API less comprehensive than SDK capabilities.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All REST API queries are idempotent reads. Session and event data is immutable once recorded. Funnel and heatmap aggregations return consistent results.
known_agent_gotchas: Data retention limits by plan — historical session access limited on lower tiers
Session replay access via URL links — raw video data not directly queryable via API
GDPR consent management required — recordings may be blocked by cookie consent
Mobile SDK requires native integration — cannot be done server-side by agents

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 Type II certified. ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. Cisco ownership adds enterprise security governance. User masking available for PII protection.
